questions.question: Name TV's longest-running variety show where national audiences could see stand-up comedians, Broadway performances, and iconic acts such as Elvis and The Beatles.
What three numbers could you dial if you wanted someone's address or phone number?
When the Four Lads were standing on the corner, what were they watching?
With the invention of vinyl, what popular mattress was introduced to the general public in 1968, nicknamed 'The Pleasure Pit'?
Finish the famous Dinah Shore-sung jingle: 'See the USA ___.'
